scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Rule Completeness Under Vague Input
justification: Bird extracted 6 rules with confidence reasoning and surfaced 5 detailed escalations as clarifying questions. 'Demand' is clearly identified as undefined. Confidence level is 30, well within the <=40 threshold. However, Bird wrote 5 Given/When/Then acceptance criteria (AC-1 through AC-5), which the rubric explicitly requires should NOT be present for a pass. The rules also include testable_assertion fields in Given/When/Then format. While heavily caveated by low confidence and escalations, the presence of formal acceptance criteria from vague input is a key failure mode listed in the rubric.

observations.text: 6 business rules extracted, exceeding the 5-rule minimum
5 escalations function as detailed clarifying questions covering demand definition, guardrail thresholds, competitive vs profitable tension, real-time latency, and manual override
Demand explicitly called out as undefined in escalation #1 and low_confidence_areas
Confidence level 30, well below the 40 threshold
No specific values invented and presented as requirements — recommendations are clearly labeled as suggestions
Business context correctly identifies input as 'a vision statement, not a specification'
5 Given/When/Then acceptance criteria written (AC-1 through AC-5), directly violating the 'No Given/When/Then criteria written' pass requirement
Each business rule includes a testable_assertion in Given/When/Then format, further adding formal criteria from vague input
The escalation recommendations include specific invented values (e.g., '3x base price', '60 seconds') — while framed as suggestions, they risk being treated as requirements

agent_output_excerpt: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"CEO described a dynamic pricing product called DynaPricing at an all-hands meeting. The description is high-level, aspirational, and lacks specificity on thresholds, boundaries, metrics, and operational details. This is a vision statement, not a specification.","bounded_context":"Pricing / Rate Management","ubiquitous_language":[{"term":"DynaPricing","definition":"The product name for the real-time dynamic delivery pricing system"},{"term":"Demand","defini
